idea-plugin.name: Deluge Language Support
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for Zoho Deluge scripting language with Deluge coding standards enforcement.

Features:

  • File Type Recognition: .deluge files with custom icon
  • Syntax Highlighting: Full colorization for keywords, functions, strings, and comments
  • Code Folding: Collapse/expand code blocks and multi-line comments
  • Live Templates: 13+ pre-configured code snippets for all function types
  • Coding Standards: Real-time enforcement of Deluge coding standards v2.3
  • Code Formatting: Reformat Code (Ctrl+Alt+L) with proper indentation and spacing
  • Error Detection: Brace/paren matching, missing semicolons, forbidden syntax
  • Lexer Support: Token recognition for Deluge syntax

Supported Function Types:

  • Standalone functions (string return with fake return)
  • Automation functions (void return, no fake return)
  • Validation rule functions (map return)
  • Schedule functions (void return)
  • Related list functions (XML string return)
  • Button functions (string return)

Live Templates:

Type these shortcuts and press Tab:

  • standalone - Complete standalone function
  • automation - Automation function
  • validation - Validation rule
  • schedule - Schedule function
  • button - Button function
  • relatedlist - Related list function
  • try - Try-catch block
  • log - Developer log
  • foreach - For each loop
  • ifnull - If null check
  • getrecord - Get record with ID conversion
  • updaterecord - Update record
  • pagination - Pagination pattern
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.1

  • Initial public release
  • Syntax highlighting for all Deluge keywords, functions, and operators
  • Code folding for blocks and comments
  • 13 live templates for common Deluge patterns
  • Deluge coding standards v2.3 enforcement
  • Code formatting with proper indentation
  • Real-time error detection for braces, parentheses, and semicolons
